title: Closed Analytics App Split Follow-On Cleanup
summary: Finished the Analytics split follow-on by refreshing durable ownership, data-model, search, UI, and run-check docs; removed the remaining active tag-source and tag-module carryovers; and verified the Analytics, Data Sharing, catalogue, and Studio module boundaries.
effect: Durable docs now match the post-split contracts: Analytics owns tag source data and tag UI names, public catalogue search no longer advertises tag fields, Local Studio no longer imports a tag-studio utility name, and catalogue cleanup allowlists use the Analytics tag source path contract.
verification: py_compile for catalogue cleanup and transaction helpers
Studio operational and catalogue editor Playwright module smokes passed
stale-reference scans and git diff --check passed
